title: Air-Fried Sea Bass Sweet Treat
description: A comforting and gooey sea bass dish that is crispy outside and soft inside, perfect for a satisfying snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Lemon Zest
ingredients.notes: Fresh and finely grated for added flavor

ingredients.name: Dried Oregano
ingredients.notes: For a touch of earthiness and depth of flavor

instructions: Mix the extra-virgin olive oil, vegetable or coconut oil, granulated sugar, lemon zest, garlic powder, and dried oregano in a small bowl.
Rub the mixture onto both sides of the sea bass fillets.
Place the seasoned sea bass fillets on the air fryer basket. Cook for 10-12 minutes until golden brown and cooked through.
Carefully remove from heat, let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
